panels.description: Shows the number of occurrences of each unique ‘Live video pipeline’ error in the last 15 minutes, grouped by error type

targets.expr:
sum(count_over_time(
    {container="ai-gateway"} |= "Live video pipeline finished with error" | pattern "<_>Live video pipeline finished with error: <errorr>" 
[15m])) by (errorr)

panels.title: Ai Video Pipeline Errors by Type

panels.description: If O does not respond to a request from G within 45s, then G will not retry and flag this error.

targets.expr: sum by (pipeline, model_name, region) (increase(livepeer_ai_request_errors{error_code=~"no orchestrators available.*", pipeline=~"live-.*"}[$__interval]))

panels.title: No Orchestrators Available errors per Region

targets.expr: sum by(normalized_error_code, model_name) (label_replace(label_replace(increase(livepeer_ai_request_errors{pipeline=~"live-.*"}[1m]), "normalized_error_code", "no orchestrators available", "error_code", "no orchestrators available.*"), "normalized_error_code", "$1", "error_code", "(.*)"))

panels.description: This graph shows the amount of idle containers.
panels.title: Global Available Capacity (Idle Runners)

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({container=~"NOT_ai-gateway|live-video-to-video_comfyui_89.+"} |= `UserWarning: torch.cuda.current_device() did not return a device, returning a CPU torch device` [1h])) by (node_name)

panels.description: This graph shows the number of idle GPUs. If it goes above 0 for 5 minutes, then this alert will go off.
panels.title: Idle GPUs > 0

panels.description: This dashboard monitors the number of streams per orchestrator.
panels.title: Streams per Orchestrator

panels.description: SlowOrchestrator is a strong indicator of network connectivity issues between G/O and these tend to persist for a few hours until the tubes clear up or someone kicks something.

targets.expr:
sum by (host, region) (
    count_over_time(
        {container="ai-gateway"} |= `slow orchestrator` | regexp `url=https?://(?P<host>[^/:]+)`
    [1h])
)

panels.title: Slow Orchestrators

targets.expr: sum by(pipeline, model_name) (increase(livepeer_ai_request_errors{error_code=~"no orchestrators available.*", pipeline=~"live-.*"}[1m]))

panels.description: This dashboard monitors the number of streams per orchestrator.
panels.title: Streams per Orchestrator
